title: Un soir de rafle
writer: Henri-Georges Clouzot, Henri Decoin, Jacques Natanson
actors: Albert Préjean, Lucien Baroux, Edith Méra
plot: A sailor, who meets a lovely music hall singer during a police raid, falls in love. In a contest at a fair, he defeats a former boxing champ. The ex-champ trains the sailor to become a boxer. After he wins the French championship,...
